title: Cooler Bag, 40L Large Picnic Bag, Foldable Durable Grocery Shopping Bags, Insulated Cool Bags for Picnic, Camping, Beach, BBQ, Shopping, Family Outdoor Travel (Upgrade)
features: ✅ [INSULATED COOLER BAG]: The cool bag is made of four layers of insulated material, which can keep food and drinks cool or warm and fresh. The food-safe inner lining ensures that you can put your food directly into the bag. The built-in EPE foam provides excellent protection for your food containers, food and beverages. Great cooling bag for transporting frozen groceries, vagetables, fruits, milk, pizza, cake, snacks, beer, drinks and more.

✅ [LARGE CAPACITY]: 43 cm L * 30 cm W * 31 cm H. The maximum capacity is 40L, spacious enough to hold 64 cans of cola (330ml) or food such as sandwich, salad, snacks, drinks and fruits etc for picnics, camping, catering, beach days, tailgating, potlucks, or parties. Upgrade design with two side mesh pockets, in which you can store water bottle, thermo flask, umbrella, sunglasses or napkins, and quickly access them when needed.

✅[FOLDABLE]: The reusable shopping bags are foldable, they are easy to open and close, easy to fill. The other nice thing about them is that they can be folded into a flat shape when not in use, making them very easy to store and saving space. They are lightweight and portable after folding for carrying. Easy to clean, easy to pack, fold flat.

✅ [DURABLE]: The thermo bag are made of tear resistant 600D Oxford fabric for durability. Padded handle are connected by tight seams for a comfortable carry. The insulated bag is easy to clean and reusable. The insulated bag have two zippers. Stuff will not fall out. Zippers are made of high quality metal for long term use.

✅[CUSTOMER GUARANTEE]: We support the food delivery bag with friendly customer service and reliable after-sales service. if there are any questions, please feel free to contact us, we'll try our best to solve the problems for you.
description: Product Description Beautyshow 40L Cooler Bags Picnic Bag Thermal Bag Cooler Insulated Bag Camping Bag Freezer Bag Warming Bag Deep Freeze Bag Strong Features: ►►Keeps cold/warm: Four layers of insulation. Well insulated to store cold or hot food. Excellent product for cold and hot food delivery. ►►Premium zippers: The cooler bag has two zippers. We use high quality zipper, which minimizes the possibility of broken zipper. ►►Wide Opening Design: The wide opening design makes it easier to fill and pick up things. ►►Large Capacity: plenty of storage space for all the food you need, suitable for 3-5 people's necessary working lunch. ►►Foldable: The reusable cooler bags are fordable, easy to open and close, easy to clean, easy to pack, fold flat. ►►Durable and durable: Made of high quality materials for long service life. The thermal bags are reusable and easy to clean. Specifications: Cooling Bag Materials: aluminum foil, EPE foam, PE cotton, oxford cloth Zipper Materials: premium alloy metal Size LxWxH: 43cm x 30cm x 31cm (16.9" x 11.8" x 12.2") Capacity: 40L Color: Black Package Contents: 1 x Cooler Bag Comfortable Handles The handle is equipped with padding, which offers a comfortable grip when carrying items. Even when lifting heavy loads, it won't restrain your hands your hands. Easy to Clean The inner lining is crafted from food - grade aluminum foil. Cleaning is a breeze - simply wipe away stains with a damp cloth. What's more, it doesn't retain any odors, allowing you to use it worry - free. High Quality Fabric The exterior is crafted from tear-resistance and water-resistance 600D Oxford fabric. This robust material not only ensures extended durability but also shields your belongings from splashes and dirt. Wide Application: The insulated shopping bags are great for grocery shopping and food delivery. And you can also use it for picnic, put all the frozen items in the Cooler Bag. The reusable storage bags are also great for delivering hot food. They are also great when you travel to family gatherings with cakes, pizza or salads.
